content:
Cases / Constraints
* Please reduce 10^5 to 10 because there are no existing test cases where [[N]] exceeds 10.

* The current set of test cases does not sufficiently cover the full range of [[C]], [[D]] and [[P_i]] stated in the Constraints section. Please either reduce the upper bounds there and the input values in Test 4 and Validator 4, or add additional test cases that better cover the allowed range.

Thanks.
